2.description: retrieve 200-year storm-surge areas (klimaår nå) within Kristiansand municipality

3.description: retrieve 200-year flood zones within Kristiansand municipality

4.description: intersect storm-surge areas and flood zones to find overlapping hazard areas

6.description: find parcels intersecting the overlapping hazard areas

7.description: retain only teigid for the final result
